creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #17)
Thank you for testing it. 
It's a new and rather niche port. If it gains interest, then building fdsdump for ARM can be disabled, thus people will still be able to run collector on AMR hardware, but without the ability to read dumps in place. Such a collector still might be useful, especially since for collecting IPFIX data net-mgmt/ipfixcol2 comes as 2nd choice in ports (port net-mgmt/nfdump is another versatile collector, and net-mgmt/flowd is 3rd, but this one can only process NetFlow).
